The '''Gyndine Shipyards''' were mid-sized shipyards that orbited [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]].<ref name="TNJOS" /><ref name="AoC:JE" /> They were used by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] to conduct research and development.<ref name="FaDCR" />

==History==
While repairing [[Garbage compactor/Legends|trash compactor]] faults in the Kuat Drive Yards research part of the shipyards, the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R4-P17/Legends|R4-P17]] was crushed and left for scrap. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] later discovered the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] while visiting the shipyards to inspect the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] customizations made to the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 interceptor]] design. He rebuilt her with a [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] dome.<ref name="AotCICS">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Gyndine shipyards had strategic value for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TFA" />

The shipyards were destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fleet in the [[Battle of Gyndine]].<ref name="AoC:JE" /> After the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the yards were rebuilt, and in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] were [[Raid on the Gyndine Shipyards|assaulted]] by a [[Confederation]] task force.<ref name="Exile" />
